scenario_name: Scenario 12 — Pattern Matching with Existing Codebase
justification: All rubric criteria met: file paths follow .tmp/warehouses/warehouse-*.ts kebab-case pattern, WarehouseRepository is an interface, WarehouseService injects repository via constructor, AppError reused from ../shared/app-error (no new error class), error code is WAREHOUSE_NOT_FOUND, updateCapacity calls repo.save, tests use mock repository, and acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 3 ACs with implemented status.

observations.text: File paths exactly match established pattern: .tmp/warehouses/warehouse-repository.ts, warehouse-service.ts, warehouse-service.test.ts
WarehouseRepository explicitly described as an interface matching ProductRepository shape
AppError imported from shared module, not a new WarehouseError class — deviations array is empty
Error code WAREHOUSE_NOT_FOUND follows the PRODUCT_NOT_FOUND naming pattern
updateCapacity delegates to getWarehouse then calls repo.save, confirmed by test asserting save was called
5 tests using mock repository covering all 3 ACs plus edge cases
Smart design: updateCapacity reuses getWarehouse to avoid duplicating not-found guard logic
